name: Trull Brook Golf Course
about: Trull Brook Golf Course is an 18-hole public golf facility located in Tewksbury, Massachusetts, known for its scenic views along the Merrimack River. The venue offers both traditional outdoor golf and indoor golf simulation experiences. It features a fully stocked pro shop, golf instruction, dining options at T's Grille Room, and hosts various events and functions. The facility combines outdoor play with modern simulator technology, making it a versatile destination for different types of golfers and activities.
why_golfers_like_it: 6 GolfZon simulators with hydraulic swing plates for realistic lies
Superior putting experience with accurate feedback on start line and push/pulls
Full swing analysis with immediate video replays and club/ball metrics
Ability to practice on real TOUR courses virtually
High accuracy with near-zero latency for distance and spin
Relaxed and comfortable atmosphere for public play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available at T's Grille Room
No alcohol mentioned as available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: 6 simulators with hydraulic swing plates for fairway/rough/sand simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are recommended for the best experience, though simulators may have options for rental or demo equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as allowed, though full kitchen service is available at T's Grille Room.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Trull Brook offers a welcoming atmosphere for families and junior golf programs are available.
